references.text: Huang, TC. 1997. Daphniphyllaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 13: 145-168

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 30 October 2023

species.citation: Hallier f. , Meded. Rijks-Herb. 37 (1918) 13 ; Huang, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 152; Malabrigo et al., Flora of Mt Mantalingahan Protected Landscape (2023) 84; Type: Elmer 8538 (L, holo; A, BO, E, L, US, iso), Luzon: Benguet, Baguio, Mar-1907. = Daphniphyllum obtusifolium Merr. , PJS 16 (1920) 552 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 425; Type: BS 28705 (A, holo; BO, E, L, US, iso), Luzon: Quezon, Mt Binuang, May-1917. = Daphniphyllum philippinense T.C.Huang , Ann. Missouri Bot. Gard. 53 (1966) 30; Type: FB 18357 Curran, Merritt & Zschokke (US, holo), Luzon: Benguet, Mt Pulag, Jan-1909.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BILIRAN, LUZON: Benguet, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, NEGROS (photos), PALAWAN.

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 1 (1908) 309 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 425; Huang, Taiwania 12 (1966) 188; Huang, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 162; ≡ Daphniphyllum glaucescens ssp. luzonense (Elmer) T.C.Huang , Taiwania 12 (1966) 188; Type: Elmer 8615 (L, holo; A, BO, E, K, MO, NY, US, iso), Luzon: Benguet, Baguio, Mar-1907. ≠ Daphniphyllum roxburghii auct. non Baill. ex Rosenthal ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 425. ≠ Daphniphyllum glaucescens auct. non Blume.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. BILIRAN, CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Benguet, Camarines, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Davao Oriental, MINDORO, PALAWAN, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: Quisumb. & Merr. , PJS 37 (1928) 161 ; Huang, Taiwania 12 (1966) 20; Huang, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 164; Type: BS 45708 Ramos & Edaño (A, BM, NY, US, staminate, syn); BS 45725 Ramos & Edaño (NY, pistillate, syn), Luzon: Aurora, Mt Alzapan, on slopes in the mossy forest, near the summit, c. 2000m, May/Jun-1925.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Aurora.

species.citation: Stapf , Trans. Linn. Soc. London, Bot. 4 (1894) 224 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 424; Huang, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 152.
species.notes: Daphniphyllum borneense is confined to Borneo. What is the true identity of Philippine specimens so-named then?
